races.analysis_summary: Hiney's Bar brings the strongest form line into this maiden, having placed 3rd at Colac with a solid speed figure. The Wilde stable is lethal in this region. Wild Roses Grow is the logical threat with consistent placings.

selections.name: Hiney's Bar
selections.reason: Showed excellent early speed on debut at Colac to finish 3rd. With natural improvement and the Wilde/Bates combination, he rates highest here despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Wild Roses Grow
selections.reason: Consistent filly who ran a bold 2nd at Kilmore last start. Drawn perfectly in barrier 3 to get a soft run. Handles the distance well.

selections.name: Aradeo
selections.reason: Solid 3rd on debut at Sale on Soft going. The Hayes stable places them well, and he should handle the conditions.

selections.name: Corro
selections.reason: Has race experience and fitness on his side. Can fill the frame in a field thinned by scratches.

danger_horse.name: Wild Roses Grow
danger_horse.reason: If the top pick gets trapped wide, this horse has the tactical advantage from the low draw.

races.analysis_summary: A race decimated by scratches. Triple Spirit gains a start and looks very hard to beat based on the Wangaratta placing. Villa Capitalista has the speed to challenge.

selections.name: Triple Spirit
selections.reason: Emergency who gains a run. Ran a strong 3rd at Wangaratta with a 57 rating. The Freedman stable doesn't travel for nothing.

selections.name: Villa Capitalista
selections.reason: Resumed with a solid 3rd at Ballarat. Will strip fitter for that run and maps well from the middle gate.

selections.name: Silver Snow
selections.reason: Resuming. Has placed on heavy tracks before, so the Soft 7 is a big plus. Watch betting market.

selections.name: Sundance Cowboy
selections.reason: Drawn the rail. Form is mixed but best efforts put him in the mix for a minor prize.

danger_horse.name: Villa Capitalista
danger_horse.reason: Has the early speed to control the race if allowed to dictate.

races.analysis_summary: A weak maiden plate. Chouxdino brings the best ratings but has had chances. Hellish Lee is consistent enough to feature.

selections.name: Chouxdino
selections.reason: Rates highest in a weak field. 6th at Werribee was better than it looks, and previous ratings of 52 and 69 are superior to rivals.

selections.name: Hellish Lee
selections.reason: Recent form is consistent with a 4th at Naracoorte. The wide draw is a concern but has the stamina.

selections.name: Immortal Justice
selections.reason: 3rd at Terang last start shows improvement. Drawn well to sit closer to the speed.

selections.name: Green Amber
selections.reason: 2nd at Naracoorte was a career best. Must overcome the wide barrier but is in form.

races.analysis_summary: Cuttin' Class looks the one to beat for the Maher stable, bringing strong metro/provincial form lines. Kijivu is the main danger but has a terrible draw.

selections.name: Cuttin' Class
selections.reason: 2nd at Geelong last start with a high rating (64). The Maher/Allen combination is elite. Drawn perfectly to strike.

selections.name: Kijivu
selections.reason: Narrow 2nd at Horsham last time out. Clearly has ability but the barrier (16) is a major hurdle on this track.

selections.name: Hughie's Spirit
selections.reason: Experienced campaigner who ran 2nd at Terang. Will handle the soft conditions.

selections.name: Baudin
selections.reason: Resuming from a good gate. Showed promise in previous prep and Preusker stable is dangerous here.

danger_horse.name: Kijivu
danger_horse.reason: If he overcomes the wide draw, his figures match the top pick.

races.analysis_summary: Competitive handicap. Smart Return loves this track and is in form. Superset has the class but carries weight. Misty Emotions is a threat.

selections.name: Smart Return
selections.reason: Won at this track two starts back and followed up with a close 2nd. Loves the circuit and handles soft going.

selections.name: Superset
selections.reason: 3rd at Ballarat last start. Carries top weight but drops in class. Drawn well to be competitive.

selections.name: Misty Emotions
selections.reason: Solid 6th at Ballarat. Has a very good second-up record and gets in light with the weight.

selections.name: Bancoora
selections.reason: Resuming for Preusker. Has won on soft before. Watch for a late move despite the wide draw.

races.analysis_summary: Untethered drops significantly in class from BM70 to BM56. Even with the weight, he should be too strong. My Uncle Did It is the consistent chaser.

selections.name: Untethered
selections.reason: Massive class drop. Was competing in BM70 grade, now in BM56. 2nd at Colac prior to that. The clear standout.

selections.name: My Uncle Did It
selections.reason: Very consistent type. 2nd at Colac and Terang recently. Will stay the trip and handle the ground.

selections.name: Track Patcher
selections.reason: Won at Kyneton last start. In winning form and drawn to get a lovely run.

selections.name: Side Piece
selections.reason: 4th at Horsham. Proven on soft tracks and drawn the rail to save ground.

danger_horse.name: My Uncle Did It
danger_horse.reason: Reliable and fit; will capitalize if the top pick is off his game.

races.analysis_summary: She's Impeccable is the form horse, coming off a win. Colour Our World drops from Metro grade. Tough race.

selections.name: She's Impeccable
selections.reason: Last start winner at Terang. In peak form and rates highly (68). Wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Colour Our World
selections.reason: Drops from Sandown (Metro) grade to Country BM62. This is a much easier assignment. Drawn well.

selections.name: Chantra
selections.reason: 6th at Caulfield Heath was a solid effort in better company. Rates well here.

selections.name: Sakakibara
selections.reason: Wilde stable runner. 9th at Colac was underwhelming but previous form suggests ability.

danger_horse.name: Colour Our World
danger_horse.reason: Class dropper with a good barrier.

races.analysis_summary: Simply Sassy and Tangoette ran 2nd and 3rd respectively in the same race at Ballarat. They look the pair to beat again here.

selections.name: Simply Sassy
selections.reason: Narrow 2nd at Ballarat last start. Proven on soft tracks and maps perfectly from barrier 5.

selections.name: Tangoette
selections.reason: Finished just behind Simply Sassy last time. Meets her on similar terms and drawn well.

selections.name: Marty Mcfly
selections.reason: Consistent performer. 4th at Ballarat in the same form reference race. Always competitive.

selections.name: Brazenga
selections.reason: Resuming. Won maiden well last prep. Barrier 2 gives him a chance to sprint well fresh.

danger_horse.name: Tangoette
danger_horse.reason: Very little separating her and the top pick.
